title: Garden Flowers Coloring Adventure
description: A simple coloring activity featuring common garden flowers with clear outlines, helping children learn about different flower types while developing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color the different flowers using your favorite colors. Try to use colors that match real flowers or be creative with your own color choices!

content.image: A garden scene with simple, clear outlines of different flowers including a sunflower, tulip, rose, daisy, and daffodil. Each flower has distinct petals and stems with leaves.
learningFacts: Sunflowers turn to face the sun throughout the day
Tulips are one of the first flowers to bloom in spring
Roses come in many colors including red, pink, yellow, and white
Daisies close their petals at night and open them in the morning
Bees and butterflies help flowers by moving pollen between them
